Irish Defence Forces SHIP View Case Study 5 Lamps The Beer from 'Ah Here' View Case Study Ballymaloe Foods Bring Taste to the Table View Case Study Department of Foreign Affairs Passport View Case Study Irish Defence Forces Air Corps Safefood Kid’s World ComReg Awareness Comreg Mobile WE ARE INDEPENDENT ON PURPOSE - WITH A PURPOSE In our 30 years in business, we have worked with brands across the globe, most recently: Where to find us 36 Pembroke Road Ballsbridge Dublin 4 D04E6W9 How to contact us +353 1 260 2091 Case studies Ballymaloe Foods · Bring Taste to the Table Irish Naval Service · SHIP 5 Lamps · The Beer from 'Ah Here' DFA · Passport © 2026 KICK.
Technology Our social and digital skills are combined with an ability to innovate.

We are experts in every area that matters Strategy We mine insights and study trends to develop strategic thinking, all the better to light the way towards creative. Creativity Our multi-award winning creative teams turn class-leading thinking into effective executions across all media types and forms. Experiential We have huge expertise in through-the-line campaigns, delivering solutions right through to the shop floor.

Across broadcast, digital, social, experiential, and more. We're an agency that seeks solutions, not just ideas. Why. There are only two types of solutions: those that work, and those that don't. It's a straight choice — there are no codes for faff on our timesheets. If ideas are light bulbs, solutions are beacons Solutions have a greater impact than just ideas. They grow business. And we have a proven track-record of developing advertising and marketing solutions for our clients.

| KICK Dublin
